scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ses/domain && npm run build --workspace @ses/api && npm run build --workspace @ses/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @ses/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @ses/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @ses/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ses/domain && npm run test --workspace @ses/web
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @ses/domain && npm run dev --workspace @ses/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @ses/domain && npm run start:dev --workspace @ses/api
